overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game, showing a survivor character walking down a cracked mountain highway. The scene features snow-capped peaks in the background, abandoned vehicles lining the roadside, and an overcast sky creating a somber, desaturated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway approach with snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cracked asphalt road toward the distant mountains, with a rifle and backpack visible

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain range dominating the background
utility poles and wires running parallel to the road on the right side
massive boulder outcropping beside the road
weathered highway surface with visible cracks and grass growing through
derelict cars visible in the distance along the left shoulder

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cracked mountain highway with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance. Power lines run parallel to the road and a large rock formation sits on the right side, while abandoned vehicles are scattered in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved mountain road with warning sign

events.description: character begins turning left to follow the curve of the road
passing abandoned green car on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating the left curve of the road, passing a yellow warning sign and an abandoned green vehicle on the left

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped road sign indicating a curve ahead
derelict green sedan parked on the left shoulder
large abandoned recreational vehicle visible ahead on the right

segments.scene_description: The road curves to the left, revealing a yellow warning sign and an abandoned green car on the left shoulder. An RV camper becomes visible ahead on the right side of the road as the character follows the curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain road with abandoned RV and large tree

events.description: passing the abandoned RV camper positioned on the right side of the road
passing large pine tree on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned RV and a large pine tree on the right side, with brown abandoned cars on the left

entered.detail: tall mature pine tree with thick trunk on the right roadside
derelict brown sedan parked on the left shoulder

segments.scene_description: The character passes an abandoned RV camper positioned on the right side of the road, followed by a large pine tree. Several abandoned cars line the left shoulder as the road continues toward the valley.

events.description: passing brown abandoned sedan on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing down the descending road past abandoned vehicles, approaching the valley with the mountain range still visible ahead

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain and cliffs on the left side of the road
distant valley floor becoming visible between the mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: The road descends slightly toward a valley, with rocky hillsides on the left and scattered pine trees. The character passes the final abandoned vehicles as the view opens up to the distant valley floor, with the snow-capped mountains still dominating the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a cracked mountain highway that gradually descends from a high ridge toward an expansive valley. It begins with the character walking past power lines and a large rock formation, with distant snow-capped peaks framing the horizon. As the road curves to the left, the view shifts to reveal a yellow warning sign and an abandoned green car before an RV camper appears ahead on the right. The camera then follows the character past the camper and a large pine tree, moving alongside a line of derelict vehicles on the left shoulder. Finally, the road descends slightly through rocky hillsides and scattered pines, opening up to a wide view of the valley floor while the mountains remain dominant in the distance.
